subcodes.first_line: Verily, praise doth praise God his Lord and saith: O Concourse of the Righteous and O Company of the Chosen Ones! This is the Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الحمد یحمد الله ربه و یقول یا ملا الابرار و یا ملا الاخیار یوم یوم من است
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @exhortations and counsels, @business; financial; property matters, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium
